calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Bill Symes, Esq. for Plaintiff: United Commercial Bank, a California Banking Corp.,
Plaintiff's Witness Stewart Wong, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Oakland Bag, Inc., a California Corp. and Mike Kao joint and servarl as follows:
Damages $5,300,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $285,104.88
Attorney's Fees and Costs $56,549.47
Total $5,916,678.10
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Continued To Mar-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
